title: Eric Bass
compiled_truth: Eric Bass is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-22), Eric Bass sent 3050 and received 1239 emails, totalling 4289 interactions. Top correspondents: [Bryan Hull](people/bryan-hull) (488), [Matthew Lenhart](people/matthew-lenhart) (415), [Timothy Blanchard](people/timothy-blanchard) (409), [Shanna Husser](people/shanna-husser) (404), [Jason Bass2](people/jason-bass2-compaq) (382). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, discussion_threads, eol, ffl, inbox.
